variants: Cemre Ozkan was born in Clifftop Sanctuary and pursued higher education at Emerald Gale School of Art. Currently, Cemre works at Oaken Wheel Games, where they apply their skills in Valencian speech. In addition to their professional responsibilities, they are actively involved in the community as part of the Elder Outreach at Willowcrest Passage. This role allows Cemre to connect with and support the elderly members of their community. Their dedication to both art and community service reflects their diverse interests and commitment to making a difference.

Their civic engagement is exemplified through their volunteer role with Elder Outreach at Willowcrest Passage, where they help enhance the lives of older adults. This combination of professional expertise and community dedication defines Cemre's character and contributions. They continue to strive for excellence in both their career and service to others.
